case_title: GUSTAVO RIOS VS. BYRON RENE JACOBO CABRERA, SR.

docket_entries.description: REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 5/31/22. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BYRON RENE JACOBO CABRERA, SR-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RIOS, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT CABRERA, SR., BYRON RENE JACOBO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF GUSTAVO RIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BYRON RENE IS NOT PRESENT AT THE TIME THIS MATTER WAS CALLED FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT ARRIVES TO COURT AT 1:50 P.M. AFTER THE CASE WAS HEARD AND DECIDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
